$schema_note: Pre-EMD DD Gate (Gate 5, INV-029) per ship order 2026-05-25. Runs while a deal is under_contract, BEFORE the operator wires EMD. This gate is an in-stage guard for the EMD-wire action (not a stage-advancing gate) — run-gate is diagnostic and does not move Pipeline_Stage. All 7 items are blocking; the gate returns BLOCKED with itemized reasons until every item passes. EMD button (Forge ship, downstream) will read this gate's output and stay disabled until green. Field decisions locked 2026-05-25: CMA staleness keys off Listing.arvValidatedAt (7d); Memphis_Assignment_Verified + EMD_Operator_Signoff are new operator checkboxes; buyer-track MAO = Listing.investorMao; Buyer_Median + federation severity read from Property_Intel (INV-022).
source: INV-029 ship order — Pre-EMD DD Gate

items.description: CMA present and fresh (arvValidatedAt within 7 days)
items.pass_criteria: Listing.arvValidatedAt is set AND within cma_staleness_days; CMA fetch returned ≥1 comp. Missing/stale arvValidatedAt or empty CMA → block.
Property_Intel.Buyer_Median_Value is a positive number. Null / no Property_Intel row → block (V2.1 floor truth signal absent — Decision Preconditions Rule 1).
Property_Intel.Discrepancy_Severity_Max ∈ {none, info}. amber/red → block. Null / no row → block (federation not yet run).

items.description: Assignment clause verified (EVERY state) — operator confirmed assignment is not prohibited in this contract
items.pass_criteria: Deals.Pre_EMD_Assignment_Clause_Verified must be true for every state (operator ruling 2026-06-10 — Memphis is where we learned the lesson, not the boundary of the risk). No joined Deals row -> data_missing.
Listing.investorMao is a positive number. Null / ≤0 → block (pricing math incomplete).

items.description: Photos verified against modeled condition (Sturtevant variance ≤50%)
items.pass_criteria: A photo-derived rehab exists (rehabEstimatedAt set) AND modeled-vs-evidenced footprint variance (Listing.buildingSqFt vs CMA median sqft) ≤ condition_variance_block_pct. No photo rehab on record, or variance >50% → block. (Mapped to the in-repo Sturtevant variance primitive per PC-20; revisit if a dedicated condition-variance axis is defined.)
Deals.Pre_EMD_Operator_Signoff must be true. No joined Deals row -> data_missing.
